docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, BARTHOLOMEW ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-10-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DHAMI, KIRPAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-25-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND DID NOT STIP TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, BARTHOLOMEW AS TO DEFENDANT DHAMI, KIRPAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, BARTHOLOMEW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DHAMI, KIRPAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
